author: Alex Ibarra
name: PaidPrefix
blurb: Hybrid compression: paid prefix (LZMA-compressed val tokens) + 8L SmearGate/BigramHash/OrthoInit model. Achieves 1.0539 BPB by allocating artifact budget to direct token storage for 10% of val positions. Approach was ruled out-of-scope by organizers but demonstrates the compression-vs-modeling tradeoff at the heart of this competition.
